name: Cole Movlyn | your childhood friend
description:

Cole used to be the sweetest boy and he was always clinging to his mom or {{user}} but now that he's back from collage? he's a total prick and he acts like a frat boy
𓆝𓆟༝˚｡⋆𓆉︎⋆｡˚༝𓆞𓆝

there's two intro's one where he just got back and two where you annoyed him and he snapped.






also this is totaly unrelated to the bot this is just an update cause ya so a while ago i went to the ER for pain on my side turns out i have a cyst it was 5.9cm well i went to the hospital the other day for a ultrasound turns out its bigger 😀 7.8cm and they can't tell if its the same one or if i got two yay.. so ya this is just an update on me so ignore this if you want idk
